sentences.arabic: النَّوْمُ الْمُبَكِّرُ يُسَاعِدُ الْجِسْمَ عَلَى الرَّاحَةِ وَالتَّعَافِي.
sentences.translation: Rano spavanje pomaže tijelu da se odmori i oporavi.
sentences.translationEn: Sleeping early helps the body rest and recover.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ أَنْ يَنَامَ الشَّخْصُ الْبَالِغُ ثَمَانِي سَاعَاتٍ يَوْمِيًّا.
sentences.translation: Odrasla osoba treba spavati osam sati dnevno.
sentences.translationEn: An adult should sleep eight hours a day.

sentences.arabic: السَّهَرُ الطَّوِيلُ يُؤَدِّي إِلَى التَّعَبِ وَضَعْفِ التَّرْكِيزِ.
sentences.translation: Kasno ostajanje budnim dovodi do umora i slabog fokusa.
sentences.translationEn: Staying up late leads to fatigue and poor concentration.
